form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 6th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Marines Cry carrying 58.5kg at $12. Previously second-up 8th of 11 at this track Rtg 58+ on August 10 over 1400m, slow going 7 len behind Secret Attire carrying 57.5kg at $14. Fitter for the fresh run now and she can turn in an improved performance.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 12 weeks. Finished off last campaign when last of 13 at Esperance Cl5 January 17 over 1600m, 30 len behind Zadows Landing with 60kg at $19. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at Esperance Cl5 December 5 over 1300m, 8 len behind Dadirra carrying 60kg at $8. Happy to overlook his last campaign and he's expected to bounce back last campaign.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 12 weeks. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at Esperance Cl5 December 5 over 1300m, 8 len behind Dadirra carrying 60kg at $8. Happy to overlook his last campaign and he's expected to bounce back last campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: When racing keenly was steadied away from heels near the 1300m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months second last of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 9 len behind Marines Cry carrying 54kg at $26. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Esperance Rtg 58+ on December 5 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Midnight Rush with 59kg at $31. Hard to make a case this line-up.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months 7th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 7 len behind Marines Cry with 55kg at $19. Previously second-up second last of 12 at Broome Rtg 58+ on June 14 over 1435m, 15 len behind Magnaburma carrying 58kg at $61. Still early in the prep and needs another run or two.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months favourite; won by 3 len at this track Cl2 April 3 over 1100m defeating Couldabeenahandbag carrying 56.5kg at $2.20. Previously second-up favourite; won by 2.25 len at Terang Mdn-Sw February 28 2025 over 1400m defeating Kiss'n Dance carrying 57kg at $4.40. Only needs to hold that form to be winning again. Very impressive on resumption and she looks ready to take the next step this campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the middle stages when leading.

Near the 1000m, steadied when racing close to the heels of Kissn Dance.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 10 at Albany Rtg 58+ on March 26 over 1500m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Makin Prophets carrying 52.5kg at $6. Before that 2nd of 14 at Albany Ladies Bracele on March 8 over 1500m, slow going nose behind Capricious Ruler with 52.5kg at $15. Rates highly on best form so she can turn things around.

form.formComment: Returns from a 42-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 11 at Esperance Rtg 58+ on March 1 over 1400m, 4 len behind Harlequin Prancer carrying 52.5kg at $21. The run before that second last of 8 at Esperance Cl5 on February 20 over 1300m, 4 len behind Harlequin Prancer carrying 52.5kg at $31. Draws the fence and looks a genuine chance.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Narrogin Rtg 46+ November 20 over 1900m, 12 len behind Heaps Of Moolah with 55kg at $5.50. Previously first up; second last of 10 at York May 15 over 1300m, 4 len behind Work Home Front carrying 56kg at $91. Can feature on resumption.

form.formComment: Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Marines Cry with 55kg at $21. The race before that 9th of 11 at Esperance Rtg 58+ on March 1 over 1400m, 5 len behind Harlequin Prancer with 52kg at $13. Track and trip winner previously and she's not to be discounted.
